caption: A close-up shot shows a series of colorful rectangular blocks arranged against a yellow background. A light blue block is positioned behind a yellow block, creating a layered effect. The scene is dimly lit, with the background appearing slightly out of focus and showing hints of a mechanical or industrial setting. Throughout the clip, the visual remains static, and the arrangement of the blocks does not change. White text is overlaid on the bottom half of the screen, stating, "This is the first and the last thing we should give to people who have lost everything." The text remains identical across all frames, centered over the colorful blocks. No people are visible in the scene, and there are no logos or other identifying marks.
